headline: A Look Back at Shelf-Stable Food Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: Lamb Weston (NYSE:LW) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Lamb Weston (NYSE:LW) and the best and worst performers in the shelf-stable food industry.
